testcase.name: downloadBrochureOfModel

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: span[title='Royal Enfield Hunter 350 Mileage'] div' (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
